title: pavonia paniculata
intro: Pavonia paniculata, also known as Rose Mallow or Mountain Mallow, is a flowering plant native to the Americas, characterized by its showy pink or white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pavonia paniculata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Pavonia paniculata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
